sections.title: If the player has not yet completed a lap of the Prifddinas Agility Course

lines.speaker: Ystwyth
lines.text: You've not completed any laps of our agility course yet. There's been [amount] global completions and the global best time is [time].

lines.speaker: Ystwyth
lines.text: Hey, fancy having a go at our agility course?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do I need to do?

lines.speaker: Ystwyth
lines.text: Just head up the ladder to get started. Try not to fall!

lines.speaker: Ystwyth
lines.text: Hey, I see you've been having a go at our agility course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you been spying on me?

lines.speaker: Ystwyth
lines.text: I like to keep an eye on everyone who gives it a go. Speaking of which, want to know more about how you've been doing?

lines.speaker: Ystwyth
lines.text: You've completed [amount] laps of our agility course with a best time of [time]. There's been [amount] global completions and the global best time is [time].
